title: hemitelia decurrens
intro: Hemitelia decurrens, also known as the fern-like liverwort, is a non-vascular plant species belonging to the family Hemiteliaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its potential medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Hemitelia decurrens are said to include reducing inflammation, improving liver function, and enhancing immune system responses. Hemitelia decurrens can be prepared as a tea or tincture for its medicinal uses, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
